narrative:
Cedarville township has 2,565 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 4.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.1 percentage points.
